sourcePolicy: This file intentionally contains no stock prices, market caps, valuation multiples, margins, cash-flow figures, or financial statements. Showcase financial data is fetched server-side from market/disclosure sources when playback starts and is stamped with the capture time in the Data tab.

NVDA.focus: Accelerated computing demand, operating leverage, export controls, customer concentration, and whether capex is direct demand evidence.

MSFT.focus: Cloud and enterprise distribution, AI capex productivity, cash generation, margin durability, and rate sensitivity.

TSLA.focus: EV margins, autonomy optionality, consumer credit, high-beta distribution risk, and whether optionality has measured monetization.

AMD.focus: AI accelerator share gains, margin scale, competitive pressure, hyperscaler capex, and evidence quality.
